project.title: Single Dad Applied as a Janitor — Then the Billionaire CEO Recognized His Name
project.description: Owen Carter — cựu nhà toán học góa vợ, xin làm lao công tại Bennett Dynamics để có giờ giấc ổn định nuôi con — được CEO Clare Bennett, bạn học đại học 20 năm trước, nhận ra và trọng dụng sau khi anh âm thầm giải cứu khủng hoảng kỹ thuật của công ty.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera

characters.name: Owen Carter (42 tuổi)
characters.description: 42-year-old lean tall man, calm unshakeable eyes, still composed posture that never fidgets, short dark brown hair lightly graying at the temples, gray custodial uniform, dark jacket worn soft at the elbows with a small silver safety pin holding the left collar together, always carries a small blue spiral-bound notebook tucked in his back pocket

characters.name: Owen Carter (42 tuổi, sau khi lên chức Consultant)
characters.description: 42-year-old lean tall man, calm unshakeable eyes, still composed posture that never fidgets, short dark brown hair lightly graying at the temples, light blue collared shirt and gray slacks instead of a custodial uniform, the same dark jacket with the silver safety pin kept nearby, small blue spiral-bound notebook on his desk

characters.name: Owen Carter (22 tuổi, thời đại học)
characters.description: 22-year-old man, short dark brown hair, quiet watchful eyes that give little away, reserved economical posture, plain navy blue college-era sweater and jacket, simple canvas backpack, notebook of equations

characters.name: Clare Bennett (42 tuổi, CEO)
characters.description: 42-year-old woman, shoulder-length dark hair, sharp navy blue tailored blazer, still watchful eyes that miss nothing, composed unreadable authority, calm deliberate posture

characters.name: Clare Bennett (22 tuổi, thời đại học)
characters.description: 22-year-old woman, dark hair in a loose ponytail, casual maroon college sweater, tired but determined eyes, notebook full of handwritten equations

characters.name: Greg Dalton
characters.description: 50-year-old heavyset man, thinning gray hair, ill-fitting olive green dress shirt straining at the shoulders, arms often crossed in a defensive territorial stance, hard contemptuous eyes, perpetual scowl

characters.name: Sandra
characters.description: 50-year-old woman, warm round face with quietly observant eyes, dusty rose cardigan over a cream blouse, reading glasses on a chain, gentle unhurried demeanor

characters.name: Marcus Webb
characters.description: man in his forties, short neat hair, sharp alert eyes, composed but visibly weary bearing, steel blue dress shirt with sleeves rolled up

settings.name: Sảnh chính Bennett Dynamics
settings.keywords: modern corporate lobby, floor-to-ceiling glass windows, polished concrete floor, curved reception desk, rows of plastic waiting chairs

settings.name: Văn phòng CEO (tầng 31)
settings.keywords: modern executive office on the 31st floor, glass walls on three sides, minimalist desk with laptop and phone, framed patent certificate, city skyline view

settings.name: Giảng đường đại học (20 năm trước)
settings.keywords: university lecture hall, advanced calculus classroom, wooden bench outside a mathematics building, autumn leaves on the walkway

settings.name: Hành lang văn phòng chung
settings.keywords: long office hallway corridor, fluorescent ceiling lighting, polished linoleum flooring, closed doors along the walls, floor-to-ceiling windows at the end

settings.name: Kho vật tư tầng 4
settings.keywords: narrow supply closet, shelves with cleaning supplies, labeled bins, laminated schedule sheet on the door, fluorescent lighting

settings.name: Phòng nghỉ tầng 2
settings.keywords: small office break room, round tables, coffee machine, linoleum floor

settings.name: Phòng họp khủng hoảng tầng 7
settings.keywords: corporate conference room, large table for twelve, laptops open, whiteboard covered in black blue and red marker diagrams, floor-to-ceiling windows

settings.name: Căn hộ của Owen
settings.keywords: small one-room apartment, books stacked on every surface, legal pad on a table, child's crayon drawing held by a magnet on the refrigerator

settings.name: Sảnh atrium công ty
settings.keywords: large corporate atrium, open multi-story space, employees gathered, podium area

settings.name: Văn phòng mới của Owen (tầng 3, sau khi lên chức)
settings.keywords: modern office with a whiteboard, desk by the window, mop standing in the corner beside neatly arranged markers

mood_map.nostalgic: soft golden light, warm palette, slight gaussian blur
mood_map.tense: cool blue-gray tones, hard shadows, tight framing
mood_map.hopeful: morning light, open composition, warm highlights

mood_map.calm: even soft lighting, neutral tones, balanced composition
mood_map.sad: muted desaturated palette, overcast lighting, empty space
